title: [InstCombine] Fix type mismatch in `foldBitmaskMul`
author: el-ev
description:
Resolves #199506.

`matchBitmaskMul` matches the form `!(A & N) ? 0 : N * C`.

When the select arms are splat vectors but A is a scalar, this produces malformed ir like `%57 = and i64 %49, <4 x i64> splat (i64 3689348814741910323)`.

Reproducer: https://godbolt.org/z/EYzKTxcKn

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i64> @issue199506_1(i64 %idx) {
  %b0 = and i64 %idx, 1
  %c0 = icmp eq i64 %b0, 0
  %b1 = and i64 %idx, 2
  %c1 = icmp eq i64 %b1, 0
  %hi = select i1 %c1, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 -6148914691236517206)
  %lo = select i1 %c0, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 6148914691236517205)
  %or = or <2 x i64> %hi, %lo
  ret <2 x i64> %or
}

define <2 x i64> @issue199506_2(i64 %idx) {
  %b0 = and i64 %idx, 1
  %c0 = icmp ne i64 %b0, 0
  %b1 = and i64 %idx, 2
  %c1 = icmp ne i64 %b1, 0
  %hi = select i1 %c1, <2 x i64> splat (i64 -6148914691236517206), <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
  %lo = select i1 %c0, <2 x i64> splat (i64 6148914691236517205), <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
  %or = or <2 x i64> %hi, %lo
  ret <2 x i64> %or
}

define i32 @no_chain(i32 %in, i32 %in2, i32 %in3) {
  %and0 = and i32 %in, 3
  %temp = mul nuw nsw i32 %and0, 72
  %temp3 = or disjoint i32 %temp, %in3
  %out = or disjoint i32 %temp3, %in2
  ret i32 %out
}

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Iris Shi (el-ev)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

Resolves #<!-- -->199506.

`matchBitmaskMul` matches the form `!(A & N) ? 0 : N * C`.

When the select arms are splat vectors but A is a scalar, this produces malformed ir like `%57 = and i64 %49, <4 x i64> splat (i64 3689348814741910323)`.

Reproducer: https://godbolt.org/z/EYzKTxcKn

---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/199920.diff


2 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp (+5) 
- (modified) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or-bitmask.ll (+42) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
index 5f9fecc7c5675..98a599b1f2782 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineAndOrXor.cpp
@@ -3900,6 +3900,11 @@ static std::optional<DecomposedBitMaskMul> matchBitmaskMul(Value *V) {
     if (!ICmpDecompose.has_value())
       return std::nullopt;
 
+    // decomposeBitTest may provide a scalar bit test for a vector select.
+    // Ensure the types match.
+    if (ICmpDecompose->X->getType() != V->getType())
+      return std::nullopt;
+
     assert(ICmpInst::isEquality(ICmpDecompose->Pred) &&
            ICmpDecompose->C.isZero());
 
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or-bitmask.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or-bitmask.ll
index 2ee34cdc034ad..5fd78827d5f30 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or-bitmask.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or-bitmask.ll
@@ -893,6 +893,48 @@ define i32 @no_chain(i32 %in, i32 %in2, i32 %in3) {
   ret i32 %out
 }
 
+define <2 x i64> @issue199506_1(i64 %idx) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @issue199506_1(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[B0:%.*]] = and i64 [[IDX:%.*]], 1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C0:%.*]] = icmp eq i64 [[B0]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[B1:%.*]] = and i64 [[IDX]], 2
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C1:%.*]] = icmp eq i64 [[B1]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[HI:%.*]] = select i1 [[C1]], <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 -6148914691236517206)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LO:%.*]] = select i1 [[C0]], <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 6148914691236517205)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or disjoint <2 x i64> [[HI]], [[LO]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i64> [[OR]]
+;
+  %b0 = and i64 %idx, 1
+  %c0 = icmp eq i64 %b0, 0
+  %b1 = and i64 %idx, 2
+  %c1 = icmp eq i64 %b1, 0
+  %hi = select i1 %c1, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 -6148914691236517206) ; 0xAAAA…
+  %lo = select i1 %c0, <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 6148914691236517205)  ; 0x5555…
+  %or = or <2 x i64> %hi, %lo
+  ret <2 x i64> %or
+}
+
+define <2 x i64> @issue199506_2(i64 %idx) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @issue199506_2(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[B0:%.*]] = and i64 [[IDX:%.*]], 1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C0_NOT:%.*]] = icmp eq i64 [[B0]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[B1:%.*]] = and i64 [[IDX]], 2
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[C1_NOT:%.*]] = icmp eq i64 [[B1]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[HI:%.*]] = select i1 [[C1_NOT]], <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 -6148914691236517206)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LO:%.*]] = select i1 [[C0_NOT]], <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, <2 x i64> splat (i64 6148914691236517205)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or disjoint <2 x i64> [[HI]], [[LO]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i64> [[OR]]
+;
+  %b0 = and i64 %idx, 1
+  %c0 = icmp ne i64 %b0, 0
+  %b1 = and i64 %idx, 2
+  %c1 = icmp ne i64 %b1, 0
+  %hi = select i1 %c1, <2 x i64> splat (i64 -6148914691236517206), <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
+  %lo = select i1 %c0, <2 x i64> splat (i64 6148914691236517205), <2 x i64> zeroinitializer
+  %or = or <2 x i64> %hi, %lo
+  ret <2 x i64> %or
+}
+
 ;; NOTE: These prefixes are unused and the list is autogenerated. Do not add tests below this line:
 ; CONSTSPLAT: {{.*}}
 ; CONSTVEC: {{.*}}

``````````

</details>
